Attacks.Name: Gunk Shot
Attacks.Effect: If a wild is rolled during this attack, the target character is given the Poison special condition.

Attacks.Name: Crunch
Attacks.Effect: If a wild is rolled during this attack, reduce the target character's Defense by 1 until the end of their next activation.

Attacks.Name: Poison Fang
Attacks.Effect: If a wild is rolled during this attack, the target character is given the Poison special condition and loses 1 power.

Attacks.Name: Knock Off
Attacks.Effect: If this attack deals damage, the target character loses 2 power.

Superpowers.Name: Gluttony
Superpowers.Effect: When this character removes damage or a special condition from itself, it gains 2 power.

Superpowers.Name: Poison Touch
Superpowers.Effect: When this character hits with a melee attack, if a wild is rolled, the target also gains the Poison special condition.

Superpowers.Name: Power of Alchemy
Superpowers.Effect: Choose an allied character within range that has been defeated this game. Alolan Muk gains 1 power and adds 1 die to its attack and defense rolls until the end of the round.

Attacks.Name: Belch
Attacks.Effect: If a wild is rolled during this attack, the target character is given the Poison special condition. If the target already has Poison, this attack deals 2 additional damage.

Superpowers.Name: Venom Drench
Superpowers.Effect: All enemy characters within range that have the Poison special condition lose 2 power and suffer 1 damage.

Superpowers.Name: Sucker Punch
Superpowers.Effect: Choose an enemy character within range that has not yet activated this round. That character suffers 3 damage. This superpower can be used only once per turn.
